classroom.title: Get an assignment

parameters.name: assignment_id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the classroom assignment.

classroom.descriptionHTML: Gets a GitHub Classroom assignment. Assignment will only be returned if the current user is an administrator of the GitHub Classroom for the assignment.

public_repo.description: Whether an accepted assignment creates a public repository.

type.description: Whether it's a group assignment or individual assignment.

invite_link.description: The link that a student can use to accept the assignment.

invitations_enabled.description: Whether the invitation link is enabled. Visiting an enabled invitation link will accept the assignment.

students_are_repo_admins.description: Whether students are admins on created repository when a student accepts the assignment.

feedback_pull_requests_enabled.description: Whether feedback pull request will be created when a student accepts the assignment.

max_teams.description: The maximum allowable teams for the assignment.

max_members.description: The maximum allowable members per team.

editor.description: The selected editor for the assignment.

accepted.description: The number of students that have accepted the assignment.

submitted.description: The number of students that have submitted the assignment.

passing.description: The number of students that have passed the assignment.

language.description: The programming language used in the assignment.

deadline.description: The time at which the assignment is due.

starter_code_repository.title: Simple Classroom Repository
starter_code_repository.description: A GitHub repository view for Classroom

id.description: A unique identifier of the repository.

full_name.description: The full, globally unique name of the repository.

html_url.description: The URL to view the repository on GitHub.com.

node_id.description: The GraphQL identifier of the repository.

default_branch.description: The default branch for the repository.

url.description: The URL of the classroom on GitHub Classroom.

classroom.title: List accepted assignments for an assignment

parameters.name: assignment_id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the classroom assignment.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: The page number of the results to fetch. For more information, see "Using pagination in the REST API."

parameters.name: per_page
parameters.description: The number of results per page (max 100). For more information, see "Using pagination in the REST API."

classroom.descriptionHTML: Lists any assignment repositories that have been created by students accepting a GitHub Classroom assignment. Accepted assignments will only be returned if the current user is an administrator of the GitHub Classroom for the assignment.

submitted.description: Whether an accepted assignment has been submitted.

items.title: Simple Classroom User
items.description: A GitHub user simplified for Classroom.

repository.title: Simple Classroom Repository
repository.description: A GitHub repository view for Classroom

id.description: A unique identifier of the repository.

full_name.description: The full, globally unique name of the repository.

html_url.description: The URL to view the repository on GitHub.com.

node_id.description: The GraphQL identifier of the repository.

default_branch.description: The default branch for the repository.

public_repo.description: Whether an accepted assignment creates a public repository.

type.description: Whether it's a Group Assignment or Individual Assignment.

invite_link.description: The link that a student can use to accept the assignment.

invitations_enabled.description: Whether the invitation link is enabled. Visiting an enabled invitation link will accept the assignment.

students_are_repo_admins.description: Whether students are admins on created repository on accepted assignment.

feedback_pull_requests_enabled.description: Whether feedback pull request will be created on assignment acceptance.

max_teams.description: The maximum allowable teams for the assignment.

max_members.description: The maximum allowable members per team.

editor.description: The selected editor for the assignment.

accepted.description: The number of students that have accepted the assignment.

submitted.description: The number of students that have submitted the assignment.

passing.description: The number of students that have passed the assignment.

language.description: The programming language used in the assignment.

deadline.description: The time at which the assignment is due.

archived.description: Returns whether classroom is archived or not.

url.description: The url of the classroom on GitHub Classroom.

classroom.title: Get assignment grades

parameters.name: assignment_id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the classroom assignment.

classroom.descriptionHTML: Gets grades for a GitHub Classroom assignment. Grades will only be returned if the current user is an administrator of the GitHub Classroom for the assignment.

items.title: Classroom Assignment Grade
items.description: Grade for a student or groups GitHub Classroom assignment

starter_code_url.description: URL of the starter code for the assignment

student_repository_name.description: Name of the student's assignment repository

student_repository_url.description: URL of the student's assignment repository

submission_timestamp.description: Timestamp of the student's assignment submission

points_awarded.description: Number of points awarded to the student

points_available.description: Number of points available for the assignment

group_name.description: If a group assignment, name of the group the student is in

classroom.title: List classrooms

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: The page number of the results to fetch. For more information, see "Using pagination in the REST API."

parameters.name: per_page
parameters.description: The number of results per page (max 100). For more information, see "Using pagination in the REST API."

classroom.descriptionHTML: Lists GitHub Classroom classrooms for the current user. Classrooms will only be returned if the current user is an administrator of one or more GitHub Classrooms.

archived.description: Returns whether classroom is archived or not.

url.description: The url of the classroom on GitHub Classroom.

classroom.title: Get a classroom
classroom.descriptionHTML: Gets a GitHub Classroom classroom for the current user. Classroom will only be returned if the current user is an administrator of the GitHub Classroom.

organization.name: Learn how to build fault tolerant applications

url.description: The URL of the classroom on GitHub Classroom.
